basic_details.job_title: Suri Sadar Hospital Birbhum House Staff Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 13 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Suri Sadar Hospital Birbhum has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 13 House Staff (MBBS) Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with MBBS qualification can directly attend the interview on 02-06-2026.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the Suri Sadar Hospital recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Suri Sadar Hospital recruitment is House Staff (MBBS).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the House Staff (MBBS) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 13 vacancies available for the House Staff (MBBS) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The required qualification for this recruitment is MBBS.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the candidates applying for this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the Suri Sadar Hospital House Staff (MBBS) recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 02 June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the House Staff (MBBS) post?
faq.answer: The job type for the House Staff (MBBS) post is Contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Suri Sadar Hospital located?
faq.answer: Suri Sadar Hospital is located in Suri, Birbhum, West Bengal, with a pincode of 731101.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs for the Walk-in Interview.
